data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — Lines 18-19 of SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md have existing prohibitions on skipping tests and suppression comments. Test file at tests/docs/test_sub_agent_boundaries_anti_coverup.py checks for 5 anti-patterns with names, code examples (fenced blocks), rationale, and 'Do this instead' alternatives within a '## Prohibited Fix Patterns' section.
